'''''Retribution''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]].

==History==
The vessel was attached to the [[Qeimet fleet]] and functioned as home base for the [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] of [[Scimitar assault wing]]. During the [[Hook Nebula campaign]], the ''Retribution'' was essentially relegated to a support role for the TIE bombers so they could carry out the primary mission.<ref name="AJ15" />

''Retribution'' was later found to have been appropriated by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Lobax Resuun]] of the [[Tamarin sector/Legends|Tamarin sector]], some time after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It was part of his personal fleet and served as Resuun's base of operations. Being established in a Star Destroyer allowed the governor to move around the sector at will.<ref name="AB" />
